email_body:
Beste team van Konnekt,

Jullie vacature voor Content & Community Marketeer spreekt me enorm aan. Jullie zoeken iemand die van Konnekt een merk maakt waar mensen spontaan aan denken bij recruitment — precies wat ik wil bereiken met mijn achtergrond in digitale marketing en content.

Bij Episto schrijf ik SEO-gerichte blogs en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik structured data en GEO toe om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik combineer technische kennis met creatieve content, en ik help graag jullie recruiters schitteren.

Ik werk in het Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen). Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig ideeën uit te werken en collega's te pushen voor foto's of input.

Ik hoor graag of jullie net zo enthousiast zijn als ik!

Met vriendelijke groeten,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Konnekt team,

Your vacancy for Content & Community Marketeer really appeals to me. You are looking for someone who makes Konnekt a brand that people spontaneously think of when it comes to recruitment — exactly what I want to achieve with my background in digital marketing and content.

At Episto I write SEO-focused blogs and manage WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com I apply structured data and GEO to improve visibility in AI search engines. I combine technical knowledge with creative content, and I love helping your recruiters shine.

I work in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I'm taking lessons). I'm used to working out ideas independently and pushing colleagues for photos or input.

I'd love to hear if you're as excited as I am!

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste team van Konnekt,

Jullie vacature voor Content & Community Marketeer trok meteen mijn aandacht. Jullie zoeken iemand die van Konnekt een onmiskenbaar merk maakt in recruitment — iemand met oog voor verhalen, creativiteit en een flinke dosis eigen initiatief. Dat past perfect bij mij.

Als junior digital marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogs en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools als SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Search Console om prestaties te meten en te verbeteren. Daarnaast heb ik met mirook.com een eigen project opgezet waar ik structured data, entity-optimalisatie en GEO toepas om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te vergroten. Die combinatie van technische en creatieve vaardigheden maakt mij sterk in content die blijft hangen.

Jullie vragen om iemand die recruiters helpt schitteren en kandidaten en klanten laat zien waar Konnekt voor staat. Ik zie mezelf al meedenken over campagnes, collega's motiveren om voor de camera te staan, en content maken waar mensen niet zomaar voorbij scrollen. Ook durf ik 'nee' te zeggen als iets niet past — ik denk graag strategisch mee.

Mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen), maar ik communiceer vlot in het Engels en Turks. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel qua werken op locatie in Sint-Martens-Latem.

Ik hoop dat jullie net zo'n goed gevoel hebben bij mijn profiel als ik bij jullie vacature. Ik kom graag langs om kennis te maken!

Met vriendelijke groeten,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Konnekt team,

Your vacancy for Content & Community Marketeer immediately caught my attention. You are looking for someone who makes Konnekt an unmistakable brand in recruitment — someone with an eye for stories, creativity, and plenty of initiative. That fits me perfectly.

As a junior digital marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blogs, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console to measure and improve performance. Additionally, with mirook.com I set up my own project where I apply structured data, entity optimization, and GEO to increase visibility in both traditional and AI search engines. That combination of technical and creative skills makes me strong in content that sticks.

You ask for someone who helps recruiters shine and shows candidates and clients what Konnekt stands for. I can already see myself brainstorming campaigns, motivating colleagues to step in front of the camera, and creating content that people don't just scroll past. I also dare to say 'no' when something doesn't fit — I like to think strategically.

My Dutch is B1 (I'm taking lessons), but I communicate fluently in English and Turkish. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible regarding working on location in Sint-Martens-Latem.

I hope you feel as good about my profile as I do about your vacancy. I would love to come by and meet!

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- SEO & content writing: on-page SEO, keyword-targeted blogs, structured data, GEO/AEO for AI search visibility
- WordPress site building & maintenance (Elementor, Astra) with full content management
- Social media integration and content coordination (mirook.com: Instagram/Facebook)
- Data-driven performance tracking: SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Search Console, Google Ads
- Creative and strategic: able to push colleagues for input and say 'no' when needed
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
